title: Quantification noise in single cell experiments.
author: Reiter M Kirchner B Muller H Holzhauer C Mann W Pfaffl MW
content: S-EPMC3185419 PMC3185419 Quantification noise in single cell experiments. In quantitative single-cell studies, the critical part is the low amount of nucleic acids present and the resulting experimental variations.
